component.name: Bottom Sheet: Choose Session
component.description: Session assignment for job notes: back + Title-H3, optional featured row (orange “Add Job Note” or error “Remove From Session”), LABEL divider, then simple job rows for session selection.

variants.newNote: Title “New Note”; featured row `Semantic/Activity/Note` + note icon well; divider “or attach to SESSION”; session list.
variants.addToSession: Title “Add to Session”; list only (no featured row, no divider).
variants.removeEditSession: Title “Edit Session”; featured row `Semantic/Status/Error/BG` (no icon); divider “ATTACH TO DIFFERENT SESSION”; list.

noteIcon.code: QuickCaptureTileIcon kind=`newNote` in 40px well for New Initial featured row only.

codeProps.jobs: { id, title, subtitle }[] for RowCard simpleJob rows
codeProps.onFeaturedAction: optional; New Note and Remove/Edit featured rows

notes: 2026-04-07: Divider copy matches Figma casing (“SESSION” / “DIFFERENT SESSION”).
